hooks.command: echo '=== HEALTH CHECK ===' && echo '--- TypeScript ---' && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -20 && echo '--- Build ---' && npx vite build 2>&1 | tail -5 && echo '--- Security ---' && npm audit --audit-level=moderate 2>&1 | tail -10 && echo '=== DONE ===' && echo "Health check ran at $(date)" > /tmp/hook-fired.txt
